norms.text: Input MUST include TITLE, SYSTEM_ID, BUSINESS_ID in that order.
Convergence MUST produce the return set even for STOP_WAIT/STOP_HARD (best-effort set).
SAFE_BIAS must be computed from diff_report sections as specified.

prohibitions.text: Do not modify existing 8-gate orchestration files in this parallel-safe track.
Do not commit directly to main; PR only.
